default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify the scope and deliverables for Webflow Code Components.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Deliverable Defined:** A complete code component is a React file plus a `.webflow.tsx` definition file. The definition file is critical, as it exposes specific props to the Webflow designer, enabling non-technical users to customize the component.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Key Constraint:** Webflow's security model renders components in a Shadow DOM, isolating their CSS and preventing them from sharing context with the main page. This requires workarounds for common patterns and makes direct porting of libraries like ShadCN non-trivial.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [**Distribution Strategy:** Components will be hosted in a public GitHub repo for CLI installation. A WYSIWYG marketplace is not feasible due to security risks (live code execution on the canvas), making developer-focused tools like `npm` commands the only option.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Scope Expansion:** Webflow needs a proposal from GrowthX by EOD Oct 30 for an expanded engineering scope, covering Code Components and a new "Remixable Web Apps" program, to secure Q4/Q1 budget.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

## Topics

### Defining a "Complete" Code Component

  - [The core deliverable is a React component that renders correctly in the Webflow designer.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [A complete component requires two main files:](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
    1.  [**React Component File:** Standard React/TypeScript code.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
    2.  **`.webflow.tsx` Definition File:** This is the critical piece that exposes specific props to the Webflow designer.
          - [It imports the React component and Webflow-specific types (`DeclaredComponent`, `WebflowProps`).](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
          - [It uses `declareComponent` to define the component's name, description, and the subset of props a designer can control.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [**Development Tools:** Storybook is a useful but optional local dev tool for testing component states.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

### Webflow Code Component Constraints

  - [Webflow's security model has key constraints that prevent direct porting of standard React libraries:](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [**Shadow DOM:** Components render in an isolated Shadow DOM, preventing CSS conflicts but also isolating their styles and context from the main page.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [**No Shared Context:** Components cannot communicate with each other or the main page. Webflow provides workarounds (e.g., for a chart and input component to interact).](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Webpack-based:** The build process uses Webpack, which may require custom overrides for some libraries.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [**Resources:** Webflow provided docs on `Component Architecture`, `Installation`, and `Frameworks & Libraries` to explain these constraints and their solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

### Distribution & Developer Experience (DX)

  - [**Distribution Model:** Components will be hosted in a public GitHub repo. Users will install them via the Webflow CLI using `npm` commands.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**No WYSIWYG Marketplace:** A drag-and-drop interface is not feasible due to security risks. Components execute live on the Webflow canvas, making direct imports a potential exfiltration risk.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Future DX:** A more advanced CLI experience (e.g., an `init` command, component selection menu) is a long-term goal.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

### Scope Expansion & Budgeting

  - [**Request:** Webflow needs a proposal by EOD Oct 30 for an expanded engineering scope to secure Q4/Q1 budget.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [**New Program: "Remixable Web Apps"**](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a library of functional web apps (not just UI components) to help users solve problems and get started with Webflow Cloud.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
      - [**Model:** Inspired by Figma Make and Replit.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=2036.0)
      - [**Timeline:** An aggressive marketing push starts Dec 1 (one app/day), which GrowthX may support starting in January.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
  - [**Proposal Structure:** The proposal should outline capacity for both the Code Component and Web App programs, potentially splitting into "engineering" and "content" workstreams.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [Submit a proposal for expanded engineering scope (Code Components & Web Apps) by EOD Oct 30.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
      - [Validate the ability to build and render a few simple code components in the Webflow designer, confirming the process and overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [**Webflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
      - [Review the proposal and present it to FP\&A for budget approval.](https://fathom.video/share/4xV3MWAfcBUKaE1E-FNX9yN12pMLdt4j?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

action_items.description: Send GrowthX docs links: Component Architecture, Installation, Webpack overrides
Send GrowthX docs JSON schema for examples page
Schedule follow-up w/ Colin re: CLI install/DX; invite Edin
Draft Q4/Q1 engineering/content capacity proposal for Colin; send to FP&A
Research app-library examples (e.g., Replit); share w/ Jason
